data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Family/household add-ons'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Family/household add-ons', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case outlines various membership options but does not specify any details regarding family or household add-ons, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. Therefore, the evidence fails to confirm that the requirement is fully satisfied.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for family/household add-ons
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define and retrieve the family/household add-ons available for membership tiers.
